scene_title: Rosto de robo olhando para a camera
narrative_beat: Olhos carmesim do robo invasivos e frontais

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid humanoid robot face directly facing camera with glowing crimson eyes and golden metal facial details in extreme close foreground
subject.focal_point: the glowing crimson eyes staring directly into camera
subject.secondary: black swirling smoke and floating burning embers surrounding the robot face

environment.location: void of black smoke and embers

composition.foreground: robot face in vivid crimson gold

lighting.rim_light: gold rim on metal facial edges

style.post_processing: heavy halation on eyes, deep black crush, 35mm grain

mood.emotion: invasive dread, confrontation with the artificial

symbolism.primary: the image looking back — the moment prophecy stares at its fulfillment
symbolism.secondary: crimson eyes as surveillance and judgment combined

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
